case_title: PATRICIA NESBIT ET AL VS. SALLY LIU

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-12-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-23-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS PATRICIA NESBIT & CHADWICK HOWARD.
